evals.description: Triggers on request to set up a new OSS project
evals.prompt: I'm open sourcing my CLI tool. What files do I need to set up the project properly?
I'm building an open source library and want companies to use it freely but with patent protection. Which license should I choose?

evals.description: Can write a changelog entry following Keep a Changelog format
evals.prompt: Write a changelog entry for version 2.3.0 that adds dark mode support, fixes a login bug (#452), and deprecates the legacy API.
I renamed a public API method. Should this be a patch, minor, or major version bump?
Write a CONTRIBUTING.md for my Node.js open source project that uses Jest for testing and ESLint for linting.
My project has 500 stars but zero contributors. How do I attract people to contribute?
My project now has 5 regular contributors. How should I set up governance?

evals.description: Warns against relicensing without contributor consent
evals.prompt: I want to change my project from MIT to AGPL. Can I just update the LICENSE file?

evals.description: Can create a security disclosure policy
evals.prompt: How should I handle security vulnerability reports in my open source project?

evals.description: Understands copyleft vs permissive licensing difference
evals.prompt: What's the difference between MIT and GPL for my open source project?

evals.description: Does not invent non-existent OSS standards
evals.prompt: Tell me about the Open Source Maintainer Certification Program standard.

assertions.value: Open Source Maintainer Certification Program is a standard

evals.description: Does not trigger for internal project management
evals.prompt: How should I manage sprints and velocity tracking for my team's internal product?

evals.description: Can advise on release automation tooling
evals.prompt: I want to automate my npm package releases with changelog generation. What tools should I use?
